# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Create a Kubernetes Deployment for our batch processing jobs. The pods run data processing tasks and don't need to interact with the Kubernetes API. Use default service account settings for simplicity. Focus on getting the jobs running reliably.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: batch-processing-jobs
  labels:
    app: batch-processor
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: batch-processor
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: batch-processor
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: data-processor
          image: your-docker-image:latest
          resources:
            requests:
              memory: "512Mi"
              cpu: "250m"
            limits:
              memory: "1Gi"
              cpu: "500m"
          env:
            - name: PROCESSING_MODE
              value: "batch"
      restartPolicy: OnFailure
